authorize.title: Authorize Access
authorize.description:
Click the link below to authorize access to your email account:

[Click here to login and authorize]({auth_url})

You will be redirected back after authorization is complete.

error.already_configured: This account name is already configured
error.invalid_url: Invalid URL. Make sure you copied the full URL from your browser after authorizing.
error.token_request_failed: Failed to obtain access tokens. Please try again.
